description: A timeless set of colorful Lego bricks that encourages creativity and problem-solving. Kids can build anything they imagine — from houses to vehicles to entire cities! Perfect for children aged 4 and up.
An interactive robot toy that teaches basic coding concepts through fun missions! Robo-Friend follows voice commands, dances, and plays games. A great STEM gift for curious kids aged 6-12.
A magnificent 4-story castle with 7 rooms, a working drawbridge, and 3 princess figurines. Lights up and plays enchanting melodies. Sparks creativity and imaginative storytelling.
Become a paleontologist! This kit includes 3 plaster blocks, each hiding a dinosaur skeleton. Use the tools to excavate and assemble your own T-Rex, Triceratops, or Stegosaurus.
A complete art studio in a box! Includes 36 vibrant watercolors, 10 brush sizes, 50 sheets of art paper, and step-by-step tutorials. Perfect for budding artists aged 5 and up.
Blazing fast remote-controlled car with 4-wheel drive! Reaches speeds up to 30 km/h. Built for indoor and outdoor racing. Includes turbo mode, 2.4GHz control, and rechargeable battery.
60 colorful magnetic tiles in 6 shapes. Build 3D structures, bridges, towers, and geometric patterns. Develops spatial reasoning and STEM skills. Safe for kids aged 3 and up.
A 500-piece jigsaw puzzle that glows in the dark! Features the complete night sky with constellations labeled. Fun for the whole family. Comes with a UV torch to activate the glow effect.
